profile.title: Company Profile

profile.video_unsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
profile.description: BisnisonlineBGS is a company engaged in health and beauty with Apple Stemcell as our flagship product. Founded with a vision to provide the best health solutions while opening profitable business opportunities for all people.
profile.vision: To become the leading health and beauty company in Indonesia that provides positive impact for society through quality products and fair business opportunities.
profile.mission: To provide high-quality health and beauty products, empower communities through transparent business systems, and contribute to social welfare.

management.title: Top Management
management.subtitle: Visionary leaders behind Biogreen Science's success
management.larry_desc: Mr. Larry is a young entrepreneur who has founded many companies before the age of 30. Besides Biogreen Science, KOTA Cinema Mall is also one of his businesses with managed assets of 1.4 Trillion Rupiah.
management.ferry_desc: In his 20-year career, persistence and adaptability allowed Mr. Ferry to hold Top Management positions at several of the largest companies in Indonesia before joining Biogreen Science.
management.richard_desc: Has expertise in many fields of Biology: Molecular Biology, Virology, Biodefense, Bioinformatics, Food Technology, Nutrition, Health and Anti-Aging with international experience.

products.title: Product Catalog

applesc.title: Apple Stemcell
applesc.subtitle: From Rare Swiss Apple for Cell Regeneration
applesc.uttwiler_desc: Created from Uttwiler Spatläuber, a unique Swiss apple variety that has high vitality and can stay fresh for months after being picked from the tree. The extraordinary benefits of Uttwiler Spatläuber make this apple special, making it a rare and protected species, even Switzerland created a special stamp featuring the Uttwiler Spatläuber.
applesc.clinical_desc: Apple Stemcell Uttwiler Spatläuber is only developed by Mibelle Biochemistry because it has the best specialization in processing stem cells using an innovative technology called Phytocelltec™. Clinical tests related to the benefits of PhytoCellTec™ Malus Domestica were carried out by researchers experienced in stem cell development.
applesc.patent_list4: Anti-radiation caused by UV and air pollution
applesc.patent_list5: Increase Anti-Oxidant Levels in the body
applesc.patent_list6: Contains Anti-Oxidant Composition to Neutralize Free Radicals
applesc.patent_list7: Triple Peptide Containing 3 Amino Acids for Detoxification
applesc.patent_list8: Agent to Protect Skin from Pigmentation and Brighten Skin
applesc.celebrity_desc: Stem cells from the Uttwiler Spatläuber apple have been used by various global celebrities and figures such as Jennifer Lopez, Victoria Beckham, Hellen Miren, and Michelle Obama, to maintain their beauty naturally and effectively.

keunggulan.title: Advantages of Products & Services
keunggulan.subtitle: Full support for your online business success
keunggulan.item1_desc: We provide products you can sell. Starting from beauty products, health, to weight management with premium quality that is clinically tested.
keunggulan.item2_desc: We provide various contents that can be used to promote your products on social media. BisnisonlineBGS resellers will also get free digital marketing training to increase sales.
keunggulan.item3_desc: You just need to send buyer data to us. We will handle the rest until the order arrives. Of course, items will be sent on your behalf (Dropship System).

benefits.title: Benefits of Joining Us
benefits.subtitle: Various conveniences and great potential before your eyes
benefits.item1_desc: You don't need to have stock or rent a place to sell. All operations and product availability are fully managed by us.
benefits.item2_desc: With the referral program, you have the opportunity to earn tens of millions to unlimited every month and free international trips every year for high-achieving resellers.
benefits.item3_desc: The online business world continues to evolve. Here, resellers don't need to worry about huge Research & Development (R&D) costs because we regularly provide new unique and innovative products.

partner.title: OFFICIAL PARTNER MIBELLE BIOCHEMISTRY SWITZERLAND
partner.subtitle: Collaboration with various trusted parties
partner.desc: Mibelle Biochemistry is the largest food supplement and cosmetic manufacturer in Switzerland, founded in 1991 by Dr. Fred Zülli.
partner.migros_desc: Mibelle Biochemistry is a subsidiary of MIGROS, the largest retail company in Switzerland and one of the 40 largest retail companies in the world.

bionadboost.desc: A health supplement for DNA repair by increasing NAD+ volume and cellular energy to activate the body's rejuvenation process by preventing DNA damage and aging.

applescplus.desc: Biogreen Science features its latest and improved product to help fight premature aging and maintain health. Applesc Plus now contains eight active ingredients including PhytoCellTec™ Malus Domestica and Solar Vitis.

applesc.desc: Discovered in 2003, scientists found a unique apple tree in the Swiss Alps with amazing self-healing properties. PhytoCellTecTM Malus Domestica helps regenerate cells and protect stem cells from damage.

bioscmild.desc: Bio SC Mild utilizes Ashwagandha (KSM-66®) and patented Macca. Helps maintain body balance and improve stamina for both men and women.

biomildcapsule.desc: Bio Mild Capsule contains Ashwagandha (KSM-66®) and Macca to help lower stress levels, improve focus, and maintain body vitality.

bioscgold.desc: Bio SC GOLD contains ginseng extract and PhytoCellTec™ Malus Domestica to help boost male stamina, energy, and maintain reproductive health.

bioinflavia.desc: Created from a selection of Indonesia's finest spices to help the body combat various health issues triggered by inflammation.

biorawgenic.desc: Bio-Rawgenic is a natural Weight Management solution rich in protein, fiber, vitamins, and minerals to help achieve your ideal weight.

beauty2.desc: Premium collagen to maintain skin elasticity, moisture, and prevent natural signs of aging.

nutrition1.desc: High fiber supplement to support digestive health, optimal metabolism, and natural detoxification.

nutrition2.desc: High-quality protein for muscle formation, rapid recovery, and optimal physical performance.
